hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Boutique Villa De Zuilen in Hillegom offers a spacious villa with two bedrooms and two bathrooms. Guests enjoy a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Exceptional Facilities: The villa features spa facilities, a fitness centre, and a steam room. Additional amenities include an indoor play area, outdoor seating, picnic area, and a games room. Free on-site private parking is available.
Comfortable Living: The property offers a continental breakfast with juice, pancakes, cheese, and fruits. Guests can relax in the heated pool, sauna, or hot tub. The kitchen is equipped with modern appliances, ensuring a comfortable stay.
